comment: Wunschkapsel inbox. Paste the deployed Google Apps Script web-app URL into endpointUrl. The Apps Script must accept POSTed JSON {timestamp, token, wish, pageUrl, userAgent} and append a row to the worksheet 'Wünsche' in the linked spreadsheet. Headers expected: Timestamp, Token, Wish, Page URL, User Agent. Set enabled=false to disable remote forwarding entirely. Local confirmation always shows regardless of remote success.
